(00:01)
Good morning. Start off with a throat clear there. It’s 8:27 AM on Thursday.
I’m going to keep working on this offer. I’ve got a lot of time today. I think I
have a call at 1:00 or something so I’ve got several hours. I’m going to work on
this for the next couple of hours. I’m sure there’ll be interruptions as always.
Yesterday we ended with the lead, which I’m going to read through right
now and then from there I’m going to jump into the next part, which is going
back to my outline. This will be my background story, mechanism problem,
mechanism solution, product buildup and reveal, close, FAQs, stuff like that.
(00:47)
All right, so we had this headline, “I was addicted to carbs and I’ve lost 64
pounds and look 20 years younger. How I broke my addiction with the keto
diet.” The one thing I’m thinking about is if this is a realistic number or not.
For now, I’m keeping it in but I might play with that. Would 44 pounds be more
believable than 64 pounds? It is what is for now, though.
(01:11)

incredibly painful and personal. In fact, just last year I would never have been

needed to lose. My medical charts painted a scary picture of a woman with
less than 10 years to live.” Let’s do this, “painted a scary picture - the picture

sugar.” I might have to mess up the order there. “The picture of a 53-year-
old woman with type 2 diabetes, high cholesterol, high blood sugar, and less

than 10 years to live. A woman whose thyroid is completely out of whack.

(02:24)
The reason I’m here sharing it with you is because in the last 6 months, my life
has done a complete turnaround. In fact, as I hit rock bottom during my mom’s
funeral last year, I lost 64 pounds and counting. My medical charts were so
clean that my doctor jokes he must be seeing my “skinny twin sister” and for
the first time since the 1990s, I’m in love with myself on both the inside and
the outside. Just last week, I dropped off four large bags at Goodwill. Bags
that were filled with my “fat clothes,” including all the oversized jeans, blouses,
sweatshirts and even lingerie that I know I’ll never going to need to squeeze
into again.” I think this is fine, but I still... I don’t know. I have an instinct on
this I might need to change something.
(02:57)
Now even though I’ll admit that it does feel so good to be telling you all this, the
reason I made this video was not to brag. Instead, it’s because in the next few
minutes, I want to show you exactly how I was able to finally lose such a large
amount of weight. How I was able to keep the weight off almost effortlessly.”
Let me use plus in awhile. See I like that, but it’s so dense. I’m going to do a
little check marks. “Instead, it’s because in the next few minutes, I want to
show you exactly how I was able to finally lose such a large amount of weight.
Plus how I was able to keep the weight off almost effortlessly, without being
sideswiped by gnawing food cravings, without hitting plateaus and stalls,
without falling victim to emotional eating when things weren’t going my way.
I’m also going to give you a foolproof system that will let you start burning fat
today, so you can lose 20 pounds or more in the very next month and reach
your ideal body weight in much less time than you probably think is possible.
(05:14)
Of course, you’re probably wondering, so I’ll go ahead and tell you right

is all thanks to the keto diet and specifically, a very unique version of the keto

do understand. I’ve tried every diet imaginable over the last two decades, yet

self-doubts.
